deToEn accurate; 'Her kindness surprised everyone/everybody' full, 'friendliness' correctly partial.
V-10 false positive: enToDe set (teilnehmen/an etwas teilnehmen/besuchen) is genuinely German but has no umlaut/stopword token, so langEvidence can't score it. Correct as-is.
'Ihre' = possessive 'her' (Ihre Freundlichkeit = her kindness), capitalised only sentence-initially; maps to 'Her kindness'. Not formal Sie. Correct.

unit.note: All 87 items (29 vocab + 58 grammar) reviewed in full. 4 verify lenses + validate findings all resolved pre-approval: ec.003/ec.007 set strict=true (fuzzy would have accepted the unfixed wrong sentence); mc.010 carrier fixed (What he was doing…); mc.011 carrier reworded off the nonsensical cross-the-road/hopeless; mc.012 praise→'All my friends were there' (dropped above-level 'praise', no gloss needed in de-prompt); apply bewerben full→partial. Group-sort labels are clean affix tokens (German meta stripped). All 35 flags ok. Final unit of the 57-unit wave. rejectRate 0.0%.
